framework: FastAPI (Python) serving static vanilla HTML/CSS/JS — no build step
font_stack: Outfit (display) + Inter (body) + JetBrains Mono (code) via Google Fonts
palette: was dark Material-3 + glassmorphism; redesigned to light Verdant (emerald) OKLCH tokens
motion: none installed — pure CSS transitions; landing adds IntersectionObserver fade-up
spacing: custom CSS vars (4pt-ish); landing standardized on --space-* 4pt scale
preserved: all CSS class names + element ids
